title: Hyperlane Warp Routes - Solana Mainnet Deployment Funding (LUNC/USTC)
description: Community Pool spend to fund the deployment of 5 Solana programs (ISM, Warp LUNC, Warp USTC, IGP, Oracle) required to activate Hyperlane Warp Routes between Terra Classic and Solana Mainnet, enabling trustless non-custodial bridging of LUNC and USTC. Total: 9.08 SOL valued conservatively at $80/SOL = $726.40, paid in LUNC at $0.00007357 (2026-06-15) = 9,873,590 LUNC. LUNC is converted to SOL on the purchase day with published TX hashes; any remaining LUNC is returned to the community. Deployed programs are transferred to governance control. Full proposal: https://github.com/terra-classic-hyperlane/cw-hyperlane/blob/main/terraclassic/doc/funding-proposal.md
